# ChemLab

> ChemLab (https://chemlab-ten.vercel.app) is an interactive study web app for UK A-level
> chemistry (AQA, OCR, Edexcel; ages 16–18). Free tier: revision notes for the 6 core year-1 topics
> tagged with AQA specification codes, two live simulations (reaction energy profiles and an ideal-gas particle model), a full clickable periodic table with electron configurations,
> flame-test colours and group reactivity trends, plus a quiz preview, an Element Hunt game with two difficulty levels, and spot-the-mistake practical challenges. Premium (£4.99/month or £29/year): all 13 topics including year-2
> thermodynamics, transition metals and NMR, the titration-curve and Maxwell–Boltzmann simulations,
> complete AQA required-practical walkthroughs, the full 195-question quiz bank with per-topic
> practice, Element Hunt hard mode, and cloud-synced progress.

Content is verified against accredited sources: AQA specification 7405 and its Required
Practical Handbook, the Royal Society of Chemistry, CLEAPSS, NIST (CODATA and the Atomic
Spectra Database) and IUPAC.

## Pages
- [ChemLab app](https://chemlab-ten.vercel.app/): the full interactive study tool
- [Privacy policy](https://chemlab-ten.vercel.app/privacy.html): GDPR rights, EU data hosting
- [Terms of service](https://chemlab-ten.vercel.app/terms.html): subscriptions, refunds, lab-safety notice

## Facts
- Practical experiments described must only be performed in supervised school laboratories.
- The titration simulator reproduces textbook values (e.g. 0.1 M ethanoic acid: pH 2.88 initial, pH = pKa = 4.76 at half-equivalence, pH 8.73 at equivalence).
- No ads, no tracking; user data is stored encrypted in the EU (Frankfurt) and can be exported or deleted in-app.
